title: Split SKILL.md and fix lint warnings

brief.why: SKILL.md is 565 lines (max 500). Lint flags line count, missing When NOT to Use section, and extra frontmatter field. Data Model and CLI Query Patterns are reference material that doesn't need to be in the main skill file.
brief.what: 1. Create references/CLI_REFERENCE.md with CLI Setup, Query Patterns, and Data Model sections 2. Replace extracted sections in SKILL.md with brief summaries and links 3. Fix lint warnings (frontmatter requires field, proper When NOT to Use section) 4. Run lint and CSO, verify under 500 lines
brief.done: SKILL.md under 500 lines, lint passes with no line_count warning, CSO score maintained or improved

title: Strip OAuth dead code from todoist auth and add --token flag

brief.why: OAuth flow is 400 lines that never work (PLACEHOLDER credentials). Meanwhile Claude can't call todoist auth non-interactively because it uses input(). Both block smooth first-run setup.
brief.what: Remove OAuth machinery from auth.py (keep _personal_token_flow). Add --token TOKEN flag for non-interactive use. Update SKILL.md to use --token path. Remove --manual/--code flags.
brief.done: todoist auth works interactively (opens URL, prompts). todoist auth --token TOKEN works non-interactively. OAuth code deleted. SKILL.md updated.

brief.why: Timeout wrapper added but never tested - SDK may bypass it
brief.what: Set very short timeout, verify slow operations fail
brief.done: Test case proves timeout is enforced

title: Fix section/project validation to fail gracefully

brief.why: Field report: --section flag throws 400 when section doesn't exist
brief.what: Check section/project exists before API call, show available options on error
